title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 Released Today at 3 PM

detail.title: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 Released Today at 3 PM
detail.short_info: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 was released on April 9 at 3 PM on karresults.nic.in. Check your KSEAB 2nd PUC marks, toppers, and direct result link here. 2026 ದ್ವಿತೀಯ ಪಿಯುಸಿ ಪರೀಕ್ಷೆ 1 ರ ಫಲಿತಾಂಶ ಪ್ರಕಟಣೆ / II PUC Exam-1 Result 2026 was announced today.

sections.heading: Karnataka 2nd PUC Result 2026 Released Today at 3 PM

content.text: The results of the 2026 Second PUC Examination 1 was released on April 09, 2026, at 3:00 PM. Students can check their results online through the official website https://karresults.nic.in and via the KarnatakaOne Mobile App. The result information was also sent to the students’ registered mobile numbers through WhatsApp/SMS.

For the first time, the Marks Card of the students was made available through DigiLocker at https://www.digilocker.gov.in from 3:00 PM on April 09, 2026, allowing students to download their digital marksheet easily.
Karnataka II PUC Exam-1 Result 2026 goes live at 3:00 PM on the official websites mentioned below.

rows: Karnataka School Examination and Evaluation Board (KSEAB)

sections.heading: How to Check KSEEB 2nd PUC Result 2026 Online

content.text: Students can follow these easy steps to access their Karnataka PUC Results 2026:

items: Visit the official website: karresults.nic.in and kseab.karnataka.gov.in.
Enter your registration number and other required details.
Your PUC 2nd Year Result 2026 will appear on the screen.
Download and print the marksheet for future reference.

content.text: Tip: Always verify your marks and personal details in the result to avoid discrepancies during admission or document verification.
Students can view their results on multiple official portals for convenience:
All official results is activated at 3 PM on April 9, 2026.

sections.heading: When is 2nd PUC Result 2026 Karnataka Board?

content.text: The board released the result on April 9, 2026, and it became available around 3 PM on karresults.nic.in 2026 and the KSEAB portal. After the results were published, students also received the option to apply for revaluation or retotaling if required.
